name: Madison Square Garden
tagline: Arena-scale event intelligence tuned for packed concourses and vertical circulation.

scheduleTemplate.title: Penn Station Egress
scheduleTemplate.desc: Exit routing intensifies toward Seventh Avenue and Penn Station corridors.
